.assembly.title: Assembly Declaration Directive
.assembly.desc: Defines the semantic name of the compiled assembly binary. This must be placed at the root level of your file.

.version.title: Version Declaration Directive
.version.desc: Specifies the semantic version of the output assembly module.

.import.title: Import Directive
.import.desc: Imports a dependency assembly library from GSOCC VFS (such as `TLML.Lang`) or registers a namespace mapping reference (`.import namespace Name`).

.namespace.title: Namespace Scope Directive
.namespace.desc: Establishes a logical grouping namespace. Code inside a namespace block must be enclosed in curly brackets `{` and `}`.

.class.title: Class Definition Directive
.class.desc: Defines a structured object class inside a namespace block. Classes can contain fields and executable methods.

.method.title: Method Definition Directive
.method.desc: Declares an executable bytecode routine inside a class structure. Encloses stacked instructions and local labels.

.field.title: Field Declaration Directive
.field.desc: Declares a class member field variable to store persistent state.

standardLibs.TLML.Lang.Console.WriteLine: Writes a string or stack value to the standard output terminal, followed by a newline character.
standardLibs.TLML.Lang.Console.Write: Writes a string or value directly to the output console without appending a newline.
standardLibs.TLML.Lang.Console.ReadLine: Suspends execution and prompts the user for keyboard text input. Pushes the entered string onto the evaluation stack.
standardLibs.TLML.Lang.Console.Clear: Clears all terminal lines and resets console buffers.
standardLibs.TLML.Lang.Console.Beep: Generates a synthesized hardware beep alert sound via the Web Audio API.
standardLibs.TLML.Lang.Console.SetColor: Sets the active output console text color. Supports HTML color strings (e.g. '#10b981').
standardLibs.TLML.Lang.Math.Sqrt: Pops a number, computes its floating-point square root, and pushes the result onto the stack.
standardLibs.TLML.Lang.Math.Abs: Pops a number and returns its absolute (positive) magnitude.
standardLibs.TLML.Lang.Math.Pow: Pops exponent (y), pops base (x). Computes x raised to the power of y and pushes the result.
standardLibs.TLML.Lang.Math.Random: Pushes a pseudo-random floating-point value between 0.0 and 1.0 onto the stack.
standardLibs.TLML.Lang.Math.Max: Pops two numbers, evaluates which is larger, and pushes that number onto the stack.
standardLibs.TLML.Lang.Math.Min: Pops two numbers, evaluates which is smaller, and pushes that number onto the stack.
standardLibs.TLML.Lang.Environment.GetTime: Pushes a formatted string of the current machine local time onto the stack.
standardLibs.TLML.Lang.Environment.GetOSVersion: Pushes the current environment kernel OS version string onto the stack.
standardLibs.TLML.Lang.Environment.GetCurrentUser: Pushes the local shell active username ('tux') onto the stack.
standardLibs.TLML.Lang.StringUtil.Concat: Pops two string values, concatenates them, and pushes the combined result.
standardLibs.TLML.Lang.StringUtil.Length: Pops a string from the stack and pushes its total integer character count.
standardLibs.TLML.Lang.StringUtil.ToUpper: Pops a string, converts all alphabetic characters to uppercase, and pushes it.
standardLibs.TLML.Lang.StringUtil.ToLower: Pops a string, converts all alphabetic characters to lowercase, and pushes it.

completions.label: TLML.Lang.Console.WriteLine
completions.doc: Writes line value to console output line buffer.

completions.label: TLML.Lang.Console.Write
completions.doc: Writes character or string value to console output line buffer.

completions.label: TLML.Lang.Console.ReadLine
completions.doc: Pauses stack VM to receive string value from standard input line.

completions.label: TLML.Lang.Console.Clear
completions.doc: Clears diagnostics panel outputs.

completions.label: TLML.Lang.Console.Beep
completions.doc: Synthesizes standard tone chime.

completions.label: TLML.Lang.Console.SetColor
completions.doc: Sets console output text color (e.g. 'green', 'yellow').

completions.label: TLML.Lang.Math.Sqrt
completions.doc: Calculates the square root of popped stack value.

completions.label: TLML.Lang.Math.Abs
completions.doc: Returns the absolute magnitude of popped stack value.

completions.label: TLML.Lang.Math.Pow
completions.doc: Raises base to exponent (pops exponent first, then base).

completions.label: TLML.Lang.Math.Random
completions.doc: Pushes double value between 0.0 and 1.0 onto virtual stack.

completions.label: TLML.Lang.Math.Max
completions.doc: Compares two popped values, pushing the higher one.

completions.label: TLML.Lang.Math.Min
completions.doc: Compares two popped values, pushing the lower one.

completions.label: TLML.Lang.Math.Round
completions.doc: Rounds popped float or double to nearest integer.

completions.label: TLML.Lang.Environment.GetTime
completions.doc: Pushes current Unix Epoch millisecond timestamp.

completions.label: TLML.Lang.Environment.GetOSVersion
completions.doc: Pushes operating system version string.

completions.label: TLML.Lang.Environment.GetCurrentUser
completions.doc: Pushes active logged-in user name string.

completions.label: TLML.Lang.StringUtil.Concat
completions.doc: Concatenates two popped string elements.

completions.label: TLML.Lang.StringUtil.Length
completions.doc: Pushes length integer of popped string element.

completions.label: TLML.Lang.StringUtil.ToUpper
completions.doc: Converts popped string to uppercase form.

completions.label: TLML.Lang.StringUtil.ToLower
completions.doc: Converts popped string to lowercase form.
